docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GUOWEI, ZHU AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GUOWEI, ZHU ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUOWEI, ZHU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, GEORGE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,650.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE CHEN SET FOR APR-26-2010 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED FEB-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, GEORGE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEN, GEORGE HEARING SET FOR APR-26-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUOWEI, ZHU AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, GEORGE
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (MOTION TO VACATE) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEN, GEORGE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE CHEN SET FOR JUN-04-2010 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. *NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES BY DEFENDANT*.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE CHEN IS GRANTED. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE; PLAINTIFF AS AN INDIVIDUAL, DOES NOT HAVE STANDING TO SUE. COAST EXPORTS, INC. MAY FILE ITS OWN CLAIM AS IT MAY ELECT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEN, GEORGE
ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS (MOTION TO VACATE) HEARING. *NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES BY DEFENDANT".
